title: Phase 9: Refactoring & Architecture Improvements
description: Comprehensive refactoring to improve code quality, test coverage, and architectural consistency. See docs/ROADMAP.md for details.

title: 9.3 State Management Infrastructure
description: Centralize state access behind clean abstractions. Almost complete - just 9.3.10 remaining.
acceptance_criteria: All state writes use atomic pattern. Schema validation on all state reads. No direct path construction outside StateService. No direct fs read/write for state files outside StateService (UI exempted).

title: 9.3.10 Add Zod validation to all state reads
9.4 Config Source-of-Truth
description: YAML files as single source of truth for defaults. Lower priority - no issues found in 9.2 audit.
acceptance_criteria: No Zod .default() for configuration values. Config parse failures are hard errors.

title: 9.4.1 Audit Zod .default() calls and establish YAML as source
description: Find all Zod schemas with .default() calls. Ensure all defaults exist in YAML files in assets/sidekick/defaults/. Config loading fails hard if required values missing.

title: 9.4.2 Add enforcement test: all config keys have YAML defaults
description: Test that prevents configuration drift by verifying all config keys have corresponding YAML defaults.

title: 9.5 Feature Domain Consolidation
description: Move remaining feature code from daemon.ts to feature packages. Minimal work needed - 9.2.1 found architecture already clean.
acceptance_criteria: daemon.ts has no reminder-specific logic or hardcoded reminder names. Feature packages own their event definitions. All 5 FIXME comments in structured-logging.ts resolved.

title: 9.5.1 Move P&R/VC state logic from daemon.ts to feature-reminders
description: Move pr-baseline.json writes (daemon.ts:624), vc-unverified.json/IPC handlers (daemon.ts:642-705), remove hardcoded reminder names from daemon core.

title: 9.5.2 Move event definitions to feature packages
description: Move from structured-logging.ts: ReminderConsumed, ReminderStaged, RemindersCleared → feature-reminders; SummaryUpdated, SummarySkipped → feature-session-summary. Resolves 5 FIXMEs.

title: 9.6 Reminder Orchestration
description: Centralize 4 cross-reminder rules currently scattered across handlers. Replace scattered deleteReminder() calls with declarative rule engine.
acceptance_criteria: 4 cross-reminder rules in single declarative location. Handlers have single responsibility (no cross-reminder logic). Adding new reminder type doesn't require modifying existing handlers.

title: 9.6.1 Design ReminderOrchestrator rule engine
description: Declarative rules for 4 cross-reminder relationships: P&R staged→unstage VC, UserPromptSubmit→unstage VC or re-stage if unverified, VC consumed→reset P&R baseline, VC consumed→unstage P&R.

title: 9.6.2 Centralize P&R baseline state in orchestrator
description: Move pr-baseline.json management from IPC to orchestrator service. Clear read/write semantics for baseline state.

title: 9.6.3 Simplify handlers - remove scattered deleteReminder calls
description: Remove cross-reminder logic from stage-pause-and-reflect.ts, unstage-verify-completion.ts, inject-stop.ts. Handlers call orchestrator instead of direct coordination.

title: 9.7 Code Cleanup & Documentation Polish
description: Remove deprecated APIs, resolve FIXMEs, ensure documentation matches implementation. Run after refactoring stabilizes.
acceptance_criteria: No @deprecated APIs remain. All FIXMEs addressed or converted to tracked issues. Design docs current with implementation.

title: 9.7.1 Remove deprecated APIs
description: initialize()→prepare()+start() (3 locations), getTranscriptService()→prepareTranscriptService() (2 locations), getSessionState()→getTranscriptMetrics() (1 location), SessionMetricsState type alias (2 locations).

title: 9.7.2 Address remaining FIXMEs
description: structured-logging.ts:383 (extract event routing logic), transcript-service.ts:1439 (remove currentContextTokens backward compat), types/config.ts:15 (review minimal interface pattern).

title: 9.7.3 Documentation cleanup
description: Remove phase references from code comments. Update design docs if implementation diverged.
